title: SOI - BD FACSAria Fusion Cell Sorter - Instrument Shutdown

steps: Export your FCS Files and PDFs to the FCCF data server.
If necessary, create a template for your experiment.
Delete your experiment from the "Experiments Browser".
Run sequentially Rinse, Clean and dH 2 O for 5 min in a flow rate of at least 4.0
Go to “Cytometer”, “Cleaning Modes”, “Sample Line Backflush”.
On the Sample Line Backflush window, press “Start”.
Let it run for 30 seconds, then stop the Sample Line Backflush by pressing “Cancel”.
Press the green checkmark button on the Stream Window to turn off the stream.
Go to “Cytometer” → “Fluidics Shutdown” Follow the instructions on screen.
Close the DIVA software.

Open the nozzle lock (by turning it anti-clockwise until 8:00 position), remove the nozzle and install the closed loop nozzle with the red o-ring facing up. Close the nozzle lock (by turning it clockwise until the 12:00 position) and confirm on the software by pressing “Done” for the first two options.

Rinse the nozzle orifice with dH 2 O: Pour dH 2 O (from the 50 mL syringe with a filter) into a 50 mL Falcon Tube. Grab the 5 mL syringe with the yellow tip and fill it with the tube water. Take the nozzle and turn it upside down (with the red o-ring facing down!). Place the tip over the nozzle orifice and gently rinse it until it’s possible to see liquid coming through in a form of a stream.
Dry the nozzle with compressed air or soft tissue paper (be careful to not displace the o-ring!!!). Store it in its corresponding plastic case.
Keep the fluidics cart open. Click on “Done” for the next step. The Fluidics Shutdown will start and it take approximately 5 minutes.
Remove the air connection from the sheath tank and plug into the steel ethanol tank (green labeled connections). Check the instrument folder for pictures if in doubt!

Remove the fluidics tubing from the sheath filter and plug into the ethanol filter (red labeled connections). Remember to always spray 70% ethanol when exchanging the connections. Check the instrument folder for pictures if in doubt!
Open the lower right metal door in the instrument. Pull the fluidics cart by pressing the small yellow lever on the right upper part of the cart.
Confirm the Fluidics Shutdown procedure by clicking on “OK”.
Fill a 5 mL tube with 3 mL of dH 2 O. Put it on the loading port. Press “Done” to move to next step in the software. Keep the tube there after is done!
After the Fluidics Shutdown completes, vent the sheath tank by pulling up on the ring on the pressure release valve. Once done, press “OK” on the software.
Close the sort blockand the instrument coverings.
Go to “Cytometer” → “Cleaning modes” → “Clean Flow Cell”.
If the 2.0 ND filter is installed in front of the FSC detector, swap it for the ND 1.5 filter.
With the tube containing dH 2 O still on the loading port, confirm by pressing “OK”.

Spray 70% ethanol over the lid of the sheath tank before opening. Unscrew the sheath tank cover knob and remove the lid. Refill it with sheath fluid from the 20 L FACSFlow cardboard box until it reaches the upper weld line inside of the tank. Put back the lid and tighten the knob. Do not overfill the sheath tank!
Open the waste tank and add 10 mL of Sekusept Plus.
Discard all cleaning tubes. If the Accudrops tube has leftovers, put it in the fridge for posterior use.
Push back the fluidics cart and close the metal door.
Turn off the computer.
Turn off the instrument by pressing the green button on the right side.
Close the window of the biosafety cabinet and switch it off by pushing the ventilation symbol button.
Turn off the cooling unit.
Organize the workspace: put all the tip boxes, pipettes, syringe, tube boxes, collection devices, etc in its proper designated spaces.
creator: Daniel Gimenes
